translations.en: "Good $T, @Avatar. For what purpose hast thou come?"
translations.zh: 「$T 吉祥，@Avatar（聖者）。汝此來有何目的？」

translations.note: Xiao is a Chinese name, keep as 蕭

translations.zh: 「吾亦傳授@spells（法術）並販售魔法@reagents（材料）。」

translations.en: "Their secret is far more @powerful than anything I might teach thee."
translations.zh: 「其秘密遠比吾所能傳授之術更為@powerful（強大）。」

translations.en: "Truly, it would be terrible if the wrong person were to learn it."
translations.zh: 「若此秘密落入不該知曉之人手中，後果不堪設想。」

translations.en: "Only we of the Council of Wizards know the secret."
translations.zh: 「唯有吾等法師議會成員知曉此秘密。」

translations.en: "But, since thou art the Avatar, surely it is safe for thee to learn it as well."
translations.zh: 「然而，既然汝乃聖者，將此秘密告知汝應當無礙。」

translations.en: "'Tis our task to keep the forces of magic in @balance throughout the land."
translations.zh: 「維持全境魔法力量的@balance（均衡），乃吾等之責任。」

translations.en: "We also do what we can to promote the eight @virtues."

translations.zh: 「吾等於多年前創立了諸@shrines（聖壇）。」

translations.en: "Surely you know where the Lycaeum is."
"Perhaps you should speak of that to another."
"But none of you has a spell@book!"
translations.zh: 「然汝等之中無人持有法術@book（書冊）！」

translations.en: "In which Circle does $Y wish to study?"
"As everybody knows, there are only eight circles."
"I sense that $Y is only ready for the #1$1 Circle."
translations.zh: 「吾感覺 $Y 目前僅能習得第 #1$1 階法術。」

translations.en: "But such matters are not my concern..."
"I have no spells of that circle."
"Perhaps $Y is not ready for this circle."
translations.zh: 「$Y 或許尚未準備好習得此階法術。」
「此法術需 #5 枚金幣。汝有意購買嗎？」

translations.en: $N hands $Y a piece of rune-covered parchment.
translations.zh: $N 遞給 $Y 一張佈滿符文的羊皮紙。

translations.en: "Thou art not yet ready for such knowledge."
translations.zh: 「汝尚未做好接受此等知識的準備。」

translations.en: "Seek out and speak with the @wisps, and learn their secrets."
translations.zh: 「去尋訪@wisps（幽影），與之交談，習得其秘密。」

translations.en: "Then wilt thou will be prepared to enter the Eighth Circle."
translations.zh: 「如此汝方能準備進入第八階法術圈。」

translations.en: "I'll give thee #5; thou dost not need the rest."
translations.zh: 「吾給汝 #5 份；汝不需要其餘的。」

translations.en: "I'll give thee #5; thou cannot have the rest."
translations.zh: 「吾給汝 #5 份；汝無法負擔其餘的。」
「然汝負擔不起一本法術書冊！」
「一本法術書冊需 60 枚金幣。汝有意購買嗎？」
「或許汝的同伴之中有人適合。」

translator_notes: 蕭（Xiao）為法師議會成員，使用較典雅的 thee/thou 語氣。中文名蕭，保持中文原名。法術圈編號 #1$1 保留以供 VM 動態填入。魔法材料名稱（Black Pearl、Garlic 等）為系統列表，不翻譯（game engine handles item names separately）。
